format_discipline.detail: No frontmatter — first line is the H1 title. Sidecar reading.meta.json present and parses with word_count, estimated_read_minutes, citations_used, sections. Headings exactly [Overview, Key Concepts, Worked Example, In Practice, Key Takeaways] in order; References legitimately absent (zero citations, narrative_seed_only — sidecar carries references_omitted_reason).

length.detail: 2133 prose words (markdown/table syntax excluded; sidecar says 2186) — inside 1800–2200 but within ~3% of the ceiling; any revision should trim, not add. Minutes: 9.3 at 230 wpm (skill formula) / 10.7 at 200 wpm (config) — both inside 9–11.

citations.detail: Zero primary resources (resource_count 0, narrative_seed_only) — 'every primary cited' is vacuously satisfied. Zero inline markers, zero bibliography entries: no orphans, no fabricated citations. low_grounding soft finding already carried on the corpus report; surfaces at HITL #3.

forward_references.detail: Zero week-4 terms (foundation models, fine-tuning, RAG, retrieval, embeddings, agents, tool use, multimodal all absent — verified against sequence.index.json week-4 titles). Hallucination defer (line 116) is in compliant FORM: plain-words description of the failure first ('confidently, consistently mistaken'), then bare unbolded name + single parenthetical pointer to topic 3.9, no defining clause after the name. No fabricated callbacks: 'week 1 probabilistic' (1.3), 'core loop from topic 3.4', 'parameters from topic 3.5', 'week-1 experiment' (line 150) all trace to corpus callbacks the corpus critic verified against 1.3/1.4/3.4/3.5. Top-p (line 112) is in-headline sampling material per the corpus-critic cycle-2 resolution, not a deferred concept.

faithfulness.detail: Sampled 11 assertions across all sections — vocabulary size 50k–200k (corpus 5.1), chai 62% table (5.1), Paris 98% sharp vs 4% flat (5.2), greedy loop trap 'The market was busy' (5.3), one-run-in-five tea (5.4), RNG + seed (5.4), temperature-by-column table values (5.5), temp cap ~2 (5.5), score-division arithmetic 4/2 at 0.5 and 2.0 (sec 6), 0.7–1.0 consumer default (sec 7), hardware-rounding temp-0 caveat (5.6). All verbatim or close paraphrase of the corpus. 0 unsupported.

beginner_readability.detail: Every non-everyday term defined at first use in bold-term/plain-meaning shape (probability distribution, greedy decoding, sampling, random number generator, seed, temperature, top-p sampling); LLM spelled out (line 11); prior-topic terms (token, inference, parameters, deterministic) reused without redefinition per the sequence rule. No paragraph stacks 3+ new terms — the Overview names the headline pair only with everyday glosses ('weighted lottery', 'dial'). Concrete-first throughout: chai table before 'probability distribution', raffle drum before the sampling abstraction, physics intuition before the temperature table. Avg sentence length 15.5 words; zero hedging phrases.

formatting.detail: No paragraph over 4 sentences. Procedures numbered (five-step token loop, three-step stall-name walkthrough, snowball A/B runs); comparisons tabled (sharp-vs-flat, temperature columns, task-temperature). Inline examples sit beside every concept introduction — Worked Example is not carrying the load alone. Learner questions posed and answered inline ('So why isn't this the standard?', 'Where does the shake come from?'). Diagram embedded at lines 92–93 with relative path ./diagram.png (file exists beside reading.md), descriptive alt text, and an italic caption that restates the flow.

assessment_reference.detail: No assessment IDs, due weeks, or grade weights anywhere in the reading.

scope.detail: Everything taught is under the 'temperature and sampling' headline at deep depth: distribution shape, greedy decoding, weighted-lottery sampling, seed/RNG as supporting detail, temperature arithmetic, top-p as an explicitly-owned sibling sampling control (two sentences, consistent with the approved corpus). Hallucination is the only deferred concept and is in bare-name + pointer form. The 'Testing AI means accounting for sampling' bullet teaches the sampling implication only, not 3.10's evaluation rubric. No premature depth, no week-4 leakage.

gold_comparison: Meets the 3-4 deep-bar gold example: bolded first-use definitions, plain-sentences Overview before detail, single concrete thread (tea-stall name) walked end-to-end in numbered steps, blockquoted prompt text, In Practice grounded in real product behavior, self-contained Key Takeaways. Unlike the gold (whose assessment-reference line is a flagged defect), this reading carries no assessment metadata.
verdict: PASS — zero hard findings, zero soft findings on checks 5–7. Format clean (no frontmatter, exact six-section template with References legitimately omitted under narrative_seed_only, valid sidecar). Length 2133 prose words / 9.3–10.7 min, inside the deep 1800–2200 / 9–11 band but ~3% from the word ceiling — trim-not-add on any revision. Faithfulness 11/11 sampled assertions corpus-supported. Hallucination handled exactly per the defer FORM: plain-words failure description, bare unbolded name, single 3.9 pointer, no defining clause, no fabricated prior-topic callbacks. No week-4 vocabulary. Diagram correctly embedded (./diagram.png exists, alt + caption present). No assessment references. Meets the 3-4 deep gold bar. Carry-over for HITL #3: corpus-level low_grounding (narrative_seed_only) only.
